headquarters: New York, New York, United States
name: S&P Global Inc.
summary: S&P Global Inc. is a leading provider of transparent and independent ratings, benchmarks, analytics, and data to the capital and commodity markets worldwide. The company operates through several key segments: S&P Global Ratings, S&P Global Market Intelligence, S&P Dow Jones Indices, and S&P Global Commodity Insights. It serves a diverse range of customers including investment advisors, investment banks, corporations, governments, and insurance companies.
